channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump tours Boeing plane to highlight aircraft maker's delay in delivering a new Air Force One
item.description: President Donald Trump has toured a Boeing airplane to check out new hardware and technology features and highlight the aircraft maker's delay in delivering updated versions of the Air Force One presidential aircraft.
item.dc:creator: Darlene Superville, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump Media says it lost more than $400 million last year
item.description: The parent company of President Donald Trump’s social networking site Truth Social says it lost $400.9 million last year and its annual revenue declined 12% to $3.6 million.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 7 most likely GOP successors to Trump in 2028
item.description: President Trump raised eyebrows in an interview that aired Monday after he declined to name Vice President Vance as his automatic successor ahead of the 2028 presidential election. “No, but he is very capable,” Trump told fox News’ Bret Baier when asked if he viewed Vance as his 2028 successor.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, NewsNation

item.title: Justice Department asks court to dismiss corruption charges against New York City Mayor Eric Adams
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The Justice Department asked a court Friday to dismiss corruption charges against New York City Mayor Eric Adams, with a top official from Washington intervening after federal prosecutors in Manhattan rebuffed his demands to drop the case and some quit in protest.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK, LARRY NEUMEISTER, ALANNA DURKIN RICHER and ERIC TUCKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump creates council for 'energy dominance,' boosts natural gas exports and offshore drilling
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump on Friday signed an executive order formally creating a National Energy Dominance Council and directed it to move quickly to drive up already record-setting domestic oil and gas production.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW DALY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Pentagon moves to take back troops discharged over COVID-19 vaccine refusals
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Defense Department has told the military services to reach out once again to service members who were forced out or voluntarily left the military because they refused to get the COVID vaccine and see if they want to reenlist.
item.dc:creator: LOLITA C. BALDOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Foreign aid freeze temporarily lifted, but damage may already be done
item.description: Some Republican lawmakers introduced legislation to find a way to work around Trump administration cuts to USAID.
item.dc:creator: Jackie Koppell, NewsNation

item.title: Trump official considering running for California governor if Kamala Harris enters race
item.description: Richard Grenell, a Trump administration official, said Friday that he would consider entering the 2026 California governor race if former Vice President and Democratic Presidential candidate Kamala Harris joins the growing list of candidates.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, Fox 5

item.title: Annexing Canada? At Niagara Falls, Trump's idea gets eye rolls but not support
item.description: NIAGARA FALLS, N.Y. (AP) — At Niagara Falls, the iconic honeymoon and tourist destination on the U.S.-Canadian border, visitors from both countries took in President Donald Trump’s unsolicited suggestion that the U.S. annex its neighbor to the north with an air of detached amusement.
item.dc:creator: MIKE HOUSEHOLDER and JONATHAN J. COOPER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Guarded optimism in India as Trump and Modi outline plans to deepen defense partnership
item.description: SRINAGAR, India (AP) — There was guarded optimism among military experts in India as Prime Minister Narendra Modi and U.S. President Donald Trump outlined plans to ramp up sales of defense systems to New Delhi, including F-35 stealth fighter jets, to deepen the U.S.-India strategic relationship.
item.dc:creator: AIJAZ HUSSAIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Suspended Hillsborough Democrat defends online posts some say are antisemitic
item.description: The Hillsborough County Democratic Executive Committee has suspended a member until January 2027 over posts online and wording in email messages.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump’s buyout offer accepted by about 77,000 federal workers, White House says
item.description: The number amounts to less than 4% of the federal workforce, short of the White House's goal of 5% to 10%.
item.dc:creator: Kellie Meyer, Fox 5

item.title: At McMahon’s confirmation hearing, it was the Education Department on trial
item.description: In her confirmation hearing, Linda McMahon handled tough questions from Democrats, and affirmed President Trump’s plans to shrink, and potentially eliminate, the department.
item.dc:creator: Cory Turner and Jonaki Mehta, MPR News

item.title: Trump, Modi meet at Oval Office as US weighs tariffs
item.description: Before speaking with Trump, Modi met separately with Tesla CEO Elon Musk, a Trump administration official.
item.dc:creator: Robert Sherman, NewsNation

item.title: Legislature cancels meetings, closes building as Sierra storm arrives in Nevada
item.description: While Las Vegas drivers navigate rain-soaked roads for the first time in awhile, the Nevada Legislature has shut down for the day to keep drivers out of hazardous conditions in the Reno-Carson City area.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Could Kamala Harris be the next California governor? Here's how she's polling
item.description: Kamala Harris holds a substantial lead over other potential candidates to succeed California Gov. Gavin Newsom in 2026.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, NewsNation

item.title: RFK Jr. confirmed as Trump’s health secretary, over Democrats’ loud objections
item.description: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. wins confirmation to be President Trump’s secretary of the Department of Health and Human Services. The vote was 52 to 48.
item.dc:creator: Selena Simmons-Duffin, MPR News

item.title: Minnesotans, other politicians react to Sen. Tina Smith's decision not to run again
item.description: Minnesota politicians from both sides of the aisle have weighed in on the news that U.S. Sen. Tina Smith, who has served in the Senate since 2018, is retiring after next year.
item.dc:creator: MPR News Staff, MPR News

item.title: Could Kamala Harris be the next California governor? Here's how she's polling
item.description: Former Vice President and Democratic Presidential candidate Kamala Harris holds a substantial lead over other potential candidates to succeed California Gov. Gavin Newsom in 2026.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, Fox 5

item.title: Senate confirms Gabbard as Trump's director of national intelligence after Republicans fall in line
item.description: The vote Wednesday came after Republicans who had initially questioned her experience and judgment fell in line behind her nomination.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Musk defends DOGE alongside Trump in striking Oval Office moment
item.description: Elon Musk on Tuesday defended the work of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) alongside President Trump, who invited Musk to speak and sat at the resolute desk as the tech mogul gave a lengthy address.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: Nevada lawmaker moves to put Indigenous Peoples' Day on Columbus Day
item.description: Nevada law says Indigenous Peoples Day falls on Aug. 9, but a lawmaker is trying to change that with AB144, which would set the observation on the second Monday in October — the same day as Colombus Day.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Pinellas lawmaker files bill to adopt 'Gulf of America' name in Florida statutes
item.description: A Pinellas County lawmaker filed a bill that would change every mention of the Gulf of Mexico in Florida state statutes to the "Gulf of America" name proposed by President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: It’s the last week to change party affiliation ahead of NYC mayor’s race
item.description: NEW YORK CITY (PIX11) – Friday is the last day to change your party registration ahead of the 2025 mayoral election. In June, New York City voters will pick their party’s candidate for the mayoral election in November.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, PIX 11

item.title: Trump signs executive order restoring plastic straw use in government
item.description: President Donald Trump signed an executive order directing the federal government to return to using plastic straws.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, Fox 5

item.title: GOP senators 'terrified' of crossing Trump, facing Musk-funded challengers
item.description: GOP senators are "terrified" over the prospect of facing primary challengers funded by Elon Musk if they stick their necks out by opposing President Donald Trump's agenda.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, Fox 5
